positive: A minimalist, abstract representation of a rising sun over a stylized mountain range and calm ocean. Use a limited, vibrant color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, coral pink, and muted gold. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, with strong geometric shapes and clean silhouettes. The overall style should be modern flat illustration, high contrast, resembling screen printing on apparel. Focus on negative space and bold lines. Photorealistic texture should be avoided for a clean, graphic look. Highly detailed, vector-art quality, suitable for large textile print.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, signatures, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low resolution, dirty, grimy, overly realistic, photorealism, gradient shading, soft edges
